unit.note: shared external-review suite (test_external_review_config.py, test_llm_review.py, test_external_review_openai_param.py) green after the model-default swap; resolver returns openai/gpt-5.6-terra-pro.

surface_verification.justification: Config-only default-model swap (gpt-5.4 -> gpt-5.6-terra-pro). No startable user surface; resolver behavior is covered by the shared external-review unit tests (37 passed).

test_completeness.justification: Trivial complexity: a config-value swap of the default GPT review-model string. Behavior-preserving; the resolver's model resolution is covered by the existing shared external-review unit tests (37 passed). No new testable behavior is introduced.
